judge.notes: The agent correctly routed the screening question to screen_universe and returned the single matching company. The answer is appropriately concise for a factual screen. The only concern is that the answer states 'None of the AI semiconductor companies that meet the criteria are C3.ai' — this phrasing is confusing because C3.ai is the one company that did meet the criteria. The agent should rephrase to clearly state that C3.ai is the sole match, not that it is excluded. Also, the unverified-figures banner is unnecessary here since no specific figures were claimed; consider removing it for simple screens.
